examples: Chicken crisp Bone, Gristle with Sweet chili sauce, Mouthful of crisp!
Remaining vultures grab slabs of softened gristle and greedily devour them.
It is defeat that bone to flint; it is defeat that turns gristle to muscle; it is defeat that makes men invincible.
The Minotaur ran his hand over his beard and felt the flecks of gristle.
The chicken salad had to be examined carefully for bits of skin and gristle.
